g.text: Comparison of shell behavior for unquoted vs. quoted delimiters
Rule: If ANY part of the delimiter is quoted, expansion is suppressed.

ul.li: Sending code via SSH (prevent local expansion)
Embedding code with $ signs (Perl, PHP, Python)

ol.li: Escape Sequences: \ followed by $, `, ", \, or <newline> is removed.
No Backslash Processing: All characters preserved.
Raw Stream: Entire body is treated as a static string.
